Nike Air Force 1 Low × Braintrust

Built for
the SDR Team

The team that opens every door deserves a shoe that opens every conversation. A custom Air Force 1 Low for the Braintrust SDR squad. Lace up, dial out, close deals.

Colorway White / Royal Blue
For SDR Team

Tag Variation Study

Rep the Brand

Braintrust's node grid icon hand stitched in royal blue on the lateral panel and heel. Your prospects will notice.

Two Sided Story

Left shoe embroidered, right shoe debossed. Two expressions of the same identity, just like a great cold open.

Hidden Detail

Custom monogram insole with all over Braintrust pattern on deep blue. The flex only the team knows about.

Conference Ready

Clean enough for the boardroom, bold enough for the expo floor. White leather, royal blue Swoosh, unmistakable.

Every Step,
On Brand.

Pop these on before your next SKO, conference, or team offsite. The monogram insole is a Braintrust pattern visible every time you step in. The tongue reads "NIKE AIR BRAINTRUST." Your team, on your feet.

Imagine the SDR floor rocking these on day one of a new quarter. That's energy. That's culture. That's the team that hits 250% conversion lift.
